part.text: I’m unable to complete the requested move because the required import paths and package structure aren’t present in the current repository. The `NewDerivedReader` function relies on external modules (`github.com/hashicorp/go-kms-wrapping/v2/aead` and `github.com/huaweicloud/huaweicloud-sdk-go-v3/core/auth/signer/hkdf`) that are not listed in `go.mod`, and the internal types (`*multiwrapper.MultiWrapper`, `wrapping.Wrapper`) cannot be located. Without these definitions, the function cannot be accurately recreated in a new `internal/libs/crypto` package, nor can the references in the test suite be updated safely.
